seoTitle: New Farm vs New Mapoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between New Farm and New Mapoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: New Farm vs New Mapoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in New Farm and New Mapoon.
heading: New Farm vs New Mapoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between New Farm, Queensland and New Mapoon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: New Mapoon has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to New Farm (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is New Farm or New Mapoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: New Farm has a flood risk score of 33/100, while New Mapoon scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: New Farm scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. New Mapoon scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in New Farm or New Mapoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. New Mapoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
